message:
feat(cli): add model variant support to add command

Extends the add command to support the same N:model syntax as spawn,
enabling users to add agents with specific model variants to existing
sessions.

Syntax:
- ntm add myproject --cc=2           Add 2 Claude agents (default model)
- ntm add myproject --cc=1:opus      Add 1 Claude Opus agent
- ntm add myproject --cc=2:sonnet --cc=1:opus   Mixed models

Changes:
- Replaces simple int flags with AgentSpecs accumulator type
- Uses NewAgentSpecsValue for consistent parsing with spawn command
- Multiple flags of same type accumulate (--cc can be specified multiple times)

This brings feature parity with the spawn command, allowing users to
extend existing sessions with the same flexibility they have when
creating new sessions.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
